nasb.text: For you will no longer remember the oracle of the Lord, because every man’s own word will become the oracle, and you have perverted the words of the living God, the Lord of hosts, our God.

esv.text: But ‘the burden of the Lord’ you shall mention no more, for the burden is every man’s own word, and you pervert the words of the living God, the Lord of hosts, our God.

cnv.text: 你們不可再提耶和華的默示，你們各人所說的話將成為自己的重擔；因為你們曲解永活的　神萬軍之耶和華我們　神的話了。

ccb.text: 你们不可再说有耶和华的启示，因为你们把自己的话当成祂的启示，曲解你们永活的上帝——万军之耶和华的话。
